meta_title: For Founders: portfolio building to Solve tutorial hell (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to portfolio building and overcome tutorial hell. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Portfolio Building to Solve Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Break free from tutorial hell with this founder-focused guide. Master portfolio building using Antigravity and Claude Code to launch profitable AI SaaS.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell is a cycle of passive consumption that kills revenue. To escape, pivot from watching to shipping. Use Antigravity to scaffold production-ready foundations and Claude Code to iterate features rapidly. By building a portfolio of functional SaaS micro-tools, you prove your value and capture market demand instantly.
content.intro:
You have spent countless hours watching polished tutorials, feeling the false comfort of progress while your repository remains empty. This is the 'Tutorial Hell' trap—a graveyard of half-baked ideas and passive learning that generates zero recurring revenue. You are consuming, not creating, and the market doesn't pay for potential; it pays for solved problems.

It is time to incinerate the tutorial loop. We are shifting the focus from 'learning to code' to 'coding to earn.' By leveraging the velocity of Antigravity and the intelligence of Claude Code, you will transform from a spectator into a founder, shipping functional, monetizable assets that serve as proof of your technical authority.

steps.title: Define the High-Value Micro-Problem
steps.description: Identify a singular, painful workflow bottleneck for a specific niche. Focus on a tool that solves one problem perfectly rather than a broad platform.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a SaaS founder. Identify 3 high-demand, low-complexity AI micro-SaaS ideas that solve specific pain points for digital marketers. Create a feature spec for the most viable one.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Review these 3 SaaS ideas and identify the one with the fastest time-to-market and highest potential for B2B subscription pricing.'

steps.title: Architect the Lean MVP Foundation
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate a production-ready boilerplate. Stop configuring build tools manually; focus on the business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, modular Next.js 14 architecture with Tailwind CSS, Supabase authentication, and Stripe integration. Include a directory structure optimized for rapid feature iteration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize a new project using the Antigravity boilerplate architecture and verify the directory structure for deployment.'

steps.title: Rapid Feature Implementation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write your core logic. Treat AI as your senior developer—provide context, define interfaces, and let it write the boilerplate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an API route for the AI core that handles user input, processes it through OpenAI's API with specific system prompts, and returns a structured JSON response.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /add src/lib/api-handler.ts --prompt 'Implement a robust error-handling wrapper for the OpenAI API call that ensures cost-efficiency and performance.'

steps.title: Implement Monetization Hooks
steps.description: Add Stripe integration early. If you aren't collecting payments, you aren't building a business; you are building a hobby.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Stripe checkout session handler and a webhook listener to update user subscription status in the Supabase database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /add src/app/api/webhook/route.ts --prompt 'Configure Stripe webhook to listen for checkout.session.completed and update the user profile status to premium.'

steps.title: Automated Deployment & Launch
steps.description: Deploy to Vercel and set up CI/CD. Your product is only real when it is live and accessible via a public URL.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Vercel deployment configuration and a CI/CD pipeline script that runs linting and unit tests before every push to main.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Execute build script, verify all environment variables are correctly mapped, and prepare project for production deployment.'

pro_tips: Never build from scratch: Use Antigravity to scaffold components so you spend your mental energy on business logic, not CSS centering.
The 80/20 rule of AI: Spend 80% of your time on UI and user experience, and 20% on the AI logic. Users pay for the interface, not the model.
Treat Claude Code as a junior developer: Review every line of code it writes. This builds your own technical intuition faster than any tutorial.
Ship on Friday: Launching at the end of the week forces a hard deadline and gives you the weekend to monitor for critical bugs.
Build a 'Public Ledger': Document your build process on Twitter or LinkedIn. This builds your reputation as a builder, which is your most valuable asset.
content.next_steps: After deploying your MVP, focus on acquiring your first 10 users through direct outreach. Do not add new features until you have validated your value proposition with real revenue.
content.conversion_block: Stop watching others build their dreams and start collecting your own subscription revenue. The market is waiting for your solution. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
